name: @tekmidian/pai
description: Personal AI Infrastructure — persistent memory and session continuity for AI coding assistants
author: Matthias Nott

pai.description: PAI Knowledge OS — federated memory search, project registry, session management. Provides 9 tools: memory_search, memory_get, project_info, project_list, session_list, registry_search, project_detect, project_health, project_todo.

setup.prerequisite: Run 'pai setup' to configure storage backend, indexing, and daemon.
setup.daemon: Run 'pai daemon install' to start the background indexing service.

notes: Gemini CLI supports MCP servers. PAI's 9 MCP tools work fully. Hooks and skills are Claude Code-specific features that require Claude Code.
